# R&D Trash Disposal

> Same-day junk removal and interior demolition serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties in South Florida. Licensed and insured. Free estimates.

## Services

- Junk removal (residential and commercial)
- Furniture and appliance removal
- Mattress disposal
- Yard waste and debris hauling
- Construction debris removal
- Full property and estate cleanouts
- Interior demolition (kitchens, bathrooms, tile, drywall)

## Service Areas

### Miami-Dade County
Miami, Miami Beach, Hialeah, Doral, Kendall, Homestead, Aventura, North Miami

### Broward County
Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pembroke Pines, Miramar, Coral Springs, Pompano Beach, Boca Raton

## Contact

- Phone: 786-408-3783
- Website: https://rdtrash.org
- Estimate: https://rdtrash.org/estimate

## Key Facts

- Same-day service available 7 days a week
- Licensed and insured in the State of Florida
- Free estimates, no hidden fees
- Serves residential homeowners, property managers, and commercial businesses
- Hydraulic-bed truck for bulk loads
- Certificate of insurance available for commercial jobs
